basic_details.job_title: J&K Bank Football Players Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 07 Assistant Banking Associate/Banking Attendant Cadre Posts
basic_details.short_information: J&K Bank Recruitment 2026: 07 Football Players vacancies. Apply online from 11 May to 25 May 2026 at jkb.bank.in.

salary_details.pay_scale: ABA: Rs. 24,050 - 64,480 | BAT: Rs. 19,500 - 37,815 (plus other perks)

selection_process: Selection Trials + Interview (by Sports Board of the Bank)
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the Jammu and Kashmir Bank website (jkb.bank.in) under the Careers tab. No other mode of application will be accepted. The online portal is active from 11-05-2026 to 25-05-2026.
seo_tags: Jammu and Kashmir Bank Football Players Recruitment 2026
